title: Diabetic kidney screening result review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Supports GFR and urine-albumin testing, repeat confirmation, prior GFR or albuminuria trends, imaging, history, and the minimum chronicity context without diagnosing CKD from one result.
assessment.rationale: The exact KDIGO detection and chronicity section supports interval change, associated context, relevant negatives and clinician-reviewed GFR, albuminuria, prior trend or imaging documentation without diagnosing CKD from one result.

source.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
source.population: Adults and children at risk of or living with CKD, with age, cause, GFR, albuminuria, progression, treatment, and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: CKD detection, evaluation, monitoring, medication stewardship, referral, and longitudinal kidney care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected CKD, GFR, albuminuria, medication-review, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, treatment, medicine changes or doses, fixed monitoring intervals beyond stated qualifiers, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Detection of CKD and evaluation of chronicity
exact_location.locator: Practice Points 1.1.1.1–1.1.1.2 and 1.1.3.1–1.1.3.2; summary PDF pages 34 and 54–57

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports GFR and urine-albumin testing, repeat confirmation, prior GFR or albuminuria trends, imaging, history, and the minimum chronicity context without diagnosing CKD from one result.

assessment.text: Supports ACR, PCR, urinalysis, quantitative confirmation, and interpretation factors including haematuria, menstruation, exercise, and infection.
assessment.rationale: The exact albuminuria section supports patient concerns, focused assessment and urine-result context only when assessed or reviewed; it does not infer chronicity or cause.

source.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
source.population: Adults and children at risk of or living with CKD, with age, cause, GFR, albuminuria, progression, treatment, and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: CKD detection, evaluation, monitoring, medication stewardship, referral, and longitudinal kidney care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected CKD, GFR, albuminuria, medication-review, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, treatment, medicine changes or doses, fixed monitoring intervals beyond stated qualifiers, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Evaluation of albuminuria
exact_location.locator: Practice Points 1.3.1.1–1.3.1.3 and Table 16; summary PDF pages 39 and 75–76

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports ACR, PCR, urinalysis, quantitative confirmation, and interpretation factors including haematuria, menstruation, exercise, and infection.

assessment.text: Supports clinician-arranged GFR and albuminuria monitoring and evaluation of a greater-than-20-percent eGFR change or ACR doubling without mapping fixed legacy intervals.
assessment.rationale: The exact monitoring section supports clinician concern, entered plan and arranged follow-up only when decided, without generating a stage or interval.

source.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
source.population: Adults and children at risk of or living with CKD, with age, cause, GFR, albuminuria, progression, treatment, and referral qualifiers.
source.setting: CKD detection, evaluation, monitoring, medication stewardship, referral, and longitudinal kidney care.
source.exclusions: Exact for selected CKD, GFR, albuminuria, medication-review, and referral documentation. Diagnosis, treatment, medicine changes or doses, fixed monitoring intervals beyond stated qualifiers, and UAE service pathways remain clinician responsibilities.

exact_location.heading: Monitoring GFR and albuminuria in CKD
exact_location.locator: Practice Points 2.1.1–2.1.5; summary PDF pages 40 and 81–82

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports clinician-arranged GFR and albuminuria monitoring and evaluation of a greater-than-20-percent eGFR change or ACR doubling without mapping fixed legacy intervals.

assessment.text: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.
assessment.rationale: The exact DHA annual-review section supports measured vital signs, weight or BMI and home-monitoring context for adult type 2 diabetes kidney screening.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30
source.population: Adults with type 2 diabetes; specific diagnostic exclusions are stated for children, pregnancy, and selected conditions.
source.setting: Telehealth services in DHA-licensed health facilities.
source.exclusions: Direct for adult Dubai telehealth type 2 diabetes review; partial because the baseline workflow has no explicit adult-only filter and is not limited to telehealth.
source.evidence_paraphrase: Specifies hypoglycaemia awareness, home glucose review, BP and BMI, renal testing, urine ACR, HbA1c, cholesterol, podiatry, and retinal review.

sources_used.title: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Virtual Management of Type 2 Diabetes – 30

additions.final_wording: Supports GFR and urine-albumin testing, repeat confirmation, prior GFR or albuminuria trends, imaging, history, and the minimum chronicity context without diagnosing CKD from one result.
